title: Implement .tick boundary hardening and merge lifecycle
description: Implement the safety and integration path for accepted worktree results: child tk wrapper or tool-call guard design, .tick/** write friction where feasible, mandatory git diff -- .tick boundary check, branch commit, merge, conflict routing, tick close with reason, and cleanup only after durable success.
acceptance_criteria: A worktree result with source changes merges and closes the tick; a worktree result with .tick changes is refused and routed to escalation; merge conflicts preserve the worktree and record conflict files. Tests cover clean merge, .tick violation, and conflict paths.
